subcodes.first_line: Your esteemed letter arrived and its essence was filled with realities and meaning…. Praise belongs to God that the Baha’ís are the utmost well-wishers of the entire world, and you are well aware of that.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست محترم مهربانا نامه نامی شما رسید مضمون مشحون بحقائق و معانی بود معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @newspapers and the media; publications, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @martyrs and martyrdom
